stemHtml: What is the main purpose behind employing pressurized hydraulic reservoirs on jet transport aircraft?

options.a: To maintain a minimum system pressure in case of hydraulic pump failure and enabling the pilot to lower flaps and gear with the help of this reservoir pressure.
options.b: To assure the pump inlet is provided with a continuous and adequate supply of fluid free from foaming.
options.c: To increase the output pressure of the system.
